steps.title: Locate the meeting detail
steps.content: The passage says Harrell and Wells met while performing in a 1960 touring production of Lorraine Hansberry's A Raisin in the Sun. The correct choice must preserve that performance context.

steps.title: Reject wrong settings
steps.content: Choice A wrongly brings in Harrison and The Great MacDaddy. Choice B says they attended the wrong play rather than performed together. Choice C moves the meeting to an NEC workshop, after the company was founded. The answer is D.
